title: selaginella sertata
intro: Selaginella sertata, also known as the Resurrection Fern, is a type of evergreen, fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is a popular medicinal plant that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Selaginella sertata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
